name: 17" x 12" x 8" Large Woven Twisted Paper Rope Tapered Basket Gray - Brightroom™
description:
Organize your home in style and help cut clutter with the Twisted Paper Rope Large Tapered Basket from Brightroom™. Showcasing paper rope construction for a natural-looking and textured design, this spacious rectangular basket allows ample room to stow away anything from toys to throw blankets or magazines with ease, helping keep your floors and tabletops clean and clutter-free. The open top allows you to quickly and easily see what's inside, and built-in handles provide easy transport from room to room. Use this paper rope basket near a sofa or entryway console to stow away extra blankets, throw pillows and more in attractive and convenient style.

Brightroom™ started with a simple truth: When you’ve got it together, you feel better. Our versatile designs reveal the possibility in every closet, cupboard and drawer, and work together to create brilliant ways to organize your every day.

Overall Dimensions: 8 Inches (H), 12 Inches (W), 17 Inches (L)
Bottom Dimensions: 10 Inches (W), 15 Inches (L)
Interior Dimensions: 7.75 Inches (H), 11.5 Inches (W), 16.5 Inches (L)
